title: Developer Growth Analysis
description: Analyzes recent Claude Code chat history (last 24-48 hours) to identify coding patterns, recurring challenges, and skill gaps. Generates a prioritized growth report with evidence-based improvement areas, curated HackerNews learning resources, and automatically delivers it to Slack DMs.
trigger_description: Use when the user wants to understand their development patterns from recent work, identify technical gaps, get curated learning resources tailored to their actual work, or receive a structured growth report without waiting for a code review.
author: jarkendar
